Our Menu

Today's Offerings

↓

Enter

Drinks

Fresh island refreshments

Lemongrass Kooler

$6

Chilled lemongrass infusion with lime and a hint of island sweetness

His & Her Cocktails

$12

Paired Caribbean cocktails — pick your island spirit and we'll craft the perfect duo

Rum Punch

$10

Dark rum, passion fruit, lime and nutmeg over crushed ice

Mango Lassi

$7

Ripe Caribbean mango blended with yoghurt and cardamom

Coconut Water

$4

Fresh young coconut, served straight from the shell

Brunch

Island morning plates

Antiguan Platter

$16

A generous spread of Antiguan favourites — saltfish, fungi, chop-up and seasoned provisions

Soleil Vegetarian Creole

$13

Garden vegetables slow-simmered in a fragrant creole sauce with herbs and island spices

Plantain Fritters

$9

Sweet ripe plantain, fried golden and crispy, served with pepper sauce

Coconut Rice & Peas

$8

Fragrant rice simmered in coconut milk with kidney beans, thyme and scotch bonnet

Dinner

Hearty Caribbean plates

Jerk Pineapple Chicken

$18

Charcoal-grilled jerk chicken glazed with caramelised pineapple, served with festival and slaw

Seafood Medley with Coconut Curry

$22

Shrimp, fish and shellfish simmered in a rich coconut curry with island aromatics

Ribs in Guinness & Mango Sauce

$24

Slow-cooked ribs glazed in a bold Guinness and mango reduction, fall-off-the-bone tender

Brown Stew Fish

$20

Pan-fried snapper in a savory brown sauce with peppers, onions and tomatoes

Desserts

Sweet island treats

Drunk Raisins Ice Cream

$10

Creamy homemade ice cream studded with rum-soaked raisins and a drizzle of Caribbean caramel

Creole Bread Pudding with Rum Sauce

$9

Warm spiced bread pudding drenched in homemade Caribbean rum sauce

Sweet Potato Pudding

$8

Baked spiced sweet potato with coconut milk, raisins and cinnamon
